top_signals.title: SpaceX sheds $400bn in market value as debut rally hits reverse
top_signals.summary: Shares in Elon Musk’s AI and rockets group tumble more than 16% following fresh rise in US bond yields
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Bristow Is Said to Near Berry Aviation Deal in Government Push
top_signals.summary: Bristow Group Inc. is nearing an acquisition of privately held Berry Aviation Inc. as it seeks to expand in the government services sector, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Commission approves €76 million German State aid for first-of-a-kind semiconductor testing equipment facility
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 23 Jun 2026 The European Commission has approved, under EU State aid rules, a €76 million German measure to support QuantumDiamonds GmbH to set up a new facility for the production of semiconductor testing equipment in Munich.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Warning lights: UK services suffer worst shock since January 2023
top_signals.summary: Business activity across the UK economy is at a 14-month low, research has suggested, as growth has taken a toll from Labour’s political woes and the impact of the continued trade disruption.  The initial estimate for S&P Global’s purchasing managers’ index (PMI) dropped to a score of 49.4 in June, falling further below the neutral [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Commission funds first Regional Cable Hubs and launches €40 million call for cable repair capacity
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 23 Jun 2026 The European Commission will grant €5.8 million to establish the first two Regional Cable Hubs, in the Baltic Sea and the Mediterranean Sea.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Starling names HSBC veteran as chair in boardroom shake-up on road to IPO
top_signals.summary: Starling has appointed the former top boss of HSBC Bank as its new chair as the digital challenger shakes up its boardroom on the road to its long-awaited IPO. The UK fintech named Colin Bell – who has served as a non-executive director at Starling since November 2025 – as chairman of its board ahead [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Ark Invest buys $32 million worth of SpaceX shares as stock plunges 16%
top_signals.summary: SPCX fell 16.43% to close at $154.60 on Monday, erasing most of the gains recorded since its June 12 debut.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
